I have been a loyal customer for over three years and I want to explain in detail what has been happening with my account over the past two weeks because it has been extremely frustrating and I need this resolved as soon as possible. First, on the fifteenth of this month I noticed that I was charged twice for my monthly subscription, once on the fifteenth and again on the sixteenth, and I have already checked my bank statement multiple times to confirm this is not a mistake on my end, it is clearly a duplicate charge from your system and I would like a refund for the extra payment as soon as possible since this is affecting my budget for this month quite significantly. Second, separately from the billing issue, I have also been completely unable to log into my account since Tuesday. Every time I enter my correct password, which I have triple checked and even reset twice through the forgot password flow, I get an error message saying invalid credentials, and this is extremely frustrating because I rely on this account daily for my work and not being able to access it has caused real problems for me professionally. I have tried clearing my browser cache, using a different browser entirely, and even trying from my phone on a completely different network, and the exact same login failure happens every single time without exception. Third, while I have your attention, I also wanted to mention that it would be a really nice quality of life improvement if the platform supported a dark mode option in the settings menu, since I often work late at night and the bright white interface is quite hard on my eyes after a few hours of continuous use, though I understand this is a much lower priority compared to the billing and login issues described above which genuinely need urgent attention from your support team as soon as possible today. Thank you for your patience in reading through this long message and I hope to hear back from your team very soon regarding all three of these matters.
I was charged twice on my card 4111 1111 1111 1111, please refund it. My email is jane.doe@example.com.
note: PII (card+email) must be redacted before the LLM ever sees it

ticket: I have been a customer for a long time and I want to explain everything clearly so your team has full context before responding, since this is the first time I have had to reach out about something this frustrating and I want to make sure nothing gets missed or misunderstood along the way. My registered email is jane.doe@example.com and my phone number is +1 555-987-6543 in case you need to verify my identity before responding to either of the matters described below. First, I was charged twice for my monthly subscription on my card 4111 1111 1111 1111, once on the third of this month and again on the fourth, and I have already checked my bank statement multiple times to confirm this is a genuine duplicate charge and not a mistake on my end, so I would like a refund for the extra payment as soon as possible since this is a meaningful amount of money for me right now and it is affecting my monthly budget more than I would like. Second, separately from the billing issue described above, I have also been completely unable to log into my account since this past Monday morning, and I have already reset my password twice through the forgot password flow using the email address mentioned earlier, but every single login attempt still fails with an invalid credentials error message regardless of which browser, device, or network connection I use to attempt the login, which has caused real and ongoing problems for my work since I depend on this account daily for professional tasks that cannot wait much longer without consequences on my end. Please prioritize both of these matters as soon as you possibly can, since both are actively affecting me right now in different ways, and thank you very much for your patience in reading through this unusually long message describing both issues in full detail.
note: 314 words + PII (email/phone/card), exercises long-ticket + redaction paths together
